defendRoads.name: Defend Roads
defendRoads.text: Patrol Olundar roads, outposts, and city approaches before pursuing distant targets.

reinforceCapital.name: Reinforce Capital
reinforceCapital.text: Muster pact aid near Olundar Prime when possible.

harassDeadworks.name: Harass Deadworks
harassDeadworks.text: Push toward revealed Deadwalker structures and pressure their expansion.
